The '''Ssi-ruuk Star Cluster''', also known as the '''Ssi-ruuvi Cluster''', and as '''Ssi-ruuvi Space''', was a [[Star cluster/Legends|star cluster]] on the far reaches of the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]] which contained the [[Ssi'kaat system]]<ref name="TEAOC" /> and six other [[Star system/Legends|star systems]] the [[Ssi-ruu]]k have absorbed into their [[Ssi-ruuvi Imperium|Imperium]].<ref name="TTAB">''[[The Truce at Bakura]]''</ref>

The nearest [[Planet/Legends|planet]] not under [[Ssi-ruu]] control was [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]] in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]], which they later invaded. Moments after the invasion, [[Gaeriel Captison]] sent a distress signal to [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces.<ref name="TAB">''[[The Truce at Bakura]]''</ref>
